[South-eastern Baltic] LITHUANIAN NAV WARN 042/26
SOUTH-EASTERN BALTIC
SEAPORT OF KLAIPEDA AND APPROACHES – SAILING RACE
SAILING RACE 12౼14 JUNE AT KLAIPEDA SEAPORT AND APPROACHES.
START: 120900 UTC JUN, 130800 UTC JUN, 140730 UTC JUN.
CAUTION ADVISED.
CONTACT: VHF CH 68.
CANCEL THIS MSG 141400 UTC JUN.
